cross_scene_arcs.title: Barry's Evolving Relationship with Lena
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Barry establishes initial trust with Lena by holding her car keys, later arranges to meet her in Hawaii, becomes physically intimate, and after apologizing for past conflicts, reconciles and commits to future travels together.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Barry holds Lena's car keys, beginning their connection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Barry and Lena reconcile, with Barry promising to redeem pudding miles to join her travels.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Barry's Emotional Outbursts and Distress
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Barry shatters glass doors during a family dinner after teasing, confides in Walter about crying spells and seeks psychiatric help, becomes emotional when confronted with a childhood memory, and destroys a bathroom stall in rage.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Barry shatters glass doors after family members call him 'homo-boy'.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Barry exits a ruined bathroom after violently destroying a stall.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Barry's uncontrolled rage and emotional instability remain unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Barry's Encounters with Threats and Plans to Flee
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Barry seeks anonymous connection through a phone service, receives an extortion threat from Georgia, is assaulted and robbed by David and Mike D, and plans to escape to Hawaii after confiding in Lance about being in trouble.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Barry calls a phone service anonymously, requesting to be called Jack.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Barry tells Lance he is in trouble and arranges to leave for Hawaii.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The extortion and assault threats are unresolved as Barry flees, and his safety remains at risk.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Building Trust and Romantic Interest
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lena establishes trust with Barry by entrusting her car keys, develops a personal connection through a private conversation, and directly initiates a romantic date.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lena needs to leave her car at the mechanic's shop before it opens.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Date arranged for the next night with Lena's address and phone number exchanged.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Honesty and Emotional Conflict
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lena confesses her intentional pursuit to Barry, which triggers his emotional reaction during the date and leads to witnessing his denial of destructive behavior at the restaurant.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lena decides to be transparent about her motives with Barry.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Barry leaves the restaurant after an incident, with Lena accepting his evasive reassurances.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What happened in the bathroom and why Barry had an emotional reaction to the childhood story.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Intimacy and Connection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lena and Barry share their first kiss, progress to making out in a hotel lobby, and deepen their connection through mutual disclosure of disturbing affectionate impulses during intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: First kiss and brief hug in the hallway.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engaged in consensual physical intimacy with Barry commenting on the situation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Uncertainty and Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After an uncertain goodbye with vague plans, Lena witnesses Barry's sleepwalking and cryptic behavior, causing unease, but they later reconcile with apologies and plans for future travel.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Barry walks away from Lena's apartment with no confirmed plans to meet again.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Lena and Barry reconcile with a hug and kiss, and plans for Barry to redeem miles to join her travels.
